errors.meaning: Paperclip watchdog consistently times out at 120s — job is taking longer than its timeout allows, likely due to API latency or heavy Paperclip issue scanning. 3 consecutive errors, alternating between timeout and message delivery failures.
errors.suggestedFix: Increase job timeoutSeconds beyond 120 or narrow the Paperclip query scope (fewer issues, limit fields) to reduce runtime.

errors.meaning: Daily brief ran successfully and produced output but failed to deliver to the #daily-brief Slack channel. Content was generated (flight day summary, Toggl data, weather) but message post failed. 3 consecutive errors.
errors.suggestedFix: Verify the Slack channel target in delivery config — ensure 'channel:C0AMSE2TW2X' is a valid resolvable channel ID and the bot has write access.

errors.meaning: Infrastructure scan ran and produced output (version checks, MCP intel) but Slack delivery to #infrastructure failed. Content was delivered via fallback but message tool returned an error. 1 consecutive error.
errors.suggestedFix: Check delivery channel config — 'c0anlfzd1tj' target format may need 'channel:' prefix. Align with working job delivery patterns.
